allow: PowerShell(curl.exe -s "https://api.github.com/repos/zjuhechao/zjuhechao.github.io/deployments" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" -H "User-Agent: PowerShell" | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty statuses_url)

PowerShell($deps = curl.exe -s "https://api.github.com/repos/zjuhechao/zjuhechao.github.io/deployments" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" -H "User-Agent: PowerShell" | ConvertFrom-Json; "Latest deployment: id=$\($deps[0].id\) sha=$\($deps[0].sha.Substring\(0,7\)\) ref=$\($deps[0].ref\)")

PowerShell(curl.exe -s "https://api.github.com/repos/zjuhechao/zjuhechao.github.io/actions/workflows" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" -H "User-Agent: PowerShell" | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty workflows | Select-Object name, path, state)

PowerShell($runs = curl.exe -s "https://api.github.com/repos/zjuhechao/zjuhechao.github.io/actions/runs?status=completed&per_page=3" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" -H "User-Agent: PowerShell" | ConvertFrom-Json; $runs.workflow_runs | Select-Object name, status, conclusion, head_branch, head_sha | Format-Table)

PowerShell($runs = curl.exe -s "https://api.github.com/repos/zjuhechao/zjuhechao.github.io/actions/runs?branch=gh-pages&per_page=5" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" -H "User-Agent: PowerShell" | ConvertFrom-Json; $runs.workflow_runs | Select-Object name, status, conclusion, head_sha | Format-Table)
